hardware.description: NVIDIA HGX/DGX Baseboard BMC (GPU tray management controller)

model_variant_info.prefix_meaning: HGX = NVIDIA GPU baseboard platform for OEM integration
model_variant_info.suffix_meaning: Baseboard indicates the GPU tray BMC, distinct from the host CPU BMC
deployment_notes: GPU tray management controller — manages GPUs, NVLink, NVSwitch, and GPU tray power/thermal
Separate from the host CPU BMC (e.g. Dell iDRAC manages the CPU tray)
On Dell XE9780: Aspeed AST2600 BMC, DC-SCI compatible, OpenBMC, BMC-to-NVIDIA HMC
Redfish System reports Manufacturer='NVIDIA', Model='NA', SerialNumber=null, BiosVersion=null
BMC can take up to 10 minutes to become available after AC power cycle

related_variants.difference: Full NVIDIA DGX system with both CPU and GPU management integrated
Previous generation DGX system with similar HGX baseboard BMC
Dell OEM server using HGX B300 GPU tray — iDRAC manages CPU side, HGX BMC manages GPU side

redfish_identification.notes: Dell XE9780 with HGX B300 reports Model as 'NA'. Full DGX systems may report actual model strings.

research_notes.doc_discovery_method: NVIDIA DGX B300 documentation + live PG22 node testing at IREN
notes: Two independent BMCs: Dell iDRAC10 (CPU tray) and NVIDIA HGX BMC (GPU tray)
HGX BMC responds on OOB IPs for PG22 nodes at IREN
Dell OEM variant may expose a subset of full DGX Redfish capabilities
Firmware inventory may appear empty on some Dell OEM variants
SEL log entries are generic 'OEM diagnostic event' messages
Sensor paths may differ between full DGX and Dell OEM configurations
Firmware inventory can report inaccurate versions during boot
GPU processor paths: GPU_0 through GPU_7, CPU_0, CPU_1 (on full DGX)
Sensor telemetry is paged at 75 entries per request
GPU tray has no traditional BIOS — bios_settings operations are not applicable
Per-GPU power and thermal metrics available via EnvironmentMetrics endpoint
Power domain management allows per-component power limits (GPU, CPU, Memory)
Workload Power Profiles support per-component power budgets
nvfwupd CLI tool available for scripted multi-system firmware updates

known_configurations.name: Dell XE9780 with NVIDIA HGX B300 NVL8 (IREN PG22)
known_configurations.notes: Tested at IREN on PG22 nodes. PowerState, Health, SEL logs confirmed working. GPU processors and firmware inventory need further validation.

known_limitations: Dell OEM variant (XE9780) reports Model as 'NA' and SerialNumber as null
BiosVersion is null — GPU tray has no traditional BIOS
SEL log entries are generic 'OEM diagnostic event' messages
Firmware inventory may appear empty on some Dell OEM variants
Sensor paths may differ between full DGX and Dell OEM configurations
BMC can take up to 10 minutes to become available after AC power cycle
Firmware inventory can report inaccurate versions during boot
